new_text: Torus-web architecture. TECH: Next.js 15.5+/React 19 RC, TypeScript, Wagmi+AppKit (Reown), MongoDB/Mongoose, Framer Motion, Three.js. ROUTES (17): 7 public (landing/esports/rankings/community-pools/social-media/toroidal-income/volume-liquidity), 7 admin, profile, rankings-detail. DATA: WalletContext (user/address/isConnected, auto-creates user on /api/users POST, ref dedup), AdminAuthContext (JWT+CSRF localStorage, authenticatedFetch). COMPONENTS: PlayerRankings (localStorage 2h cache), PlayerDetailModal, RewardHistory (4 tabs). API: {success,data?,error?}. FLOWS: Wallet connect→POST /api/users→UsernameModal; Admin→POST /api/admin/login→JWT+CSRF; Rankings limit=20, hasPrev/hasNext; Steam: redirect→OAuth→?steam_connected=true. STYLING: dark bg-black, energy-pulse/text-glow, Framer Motion whileInView, Tailwind responsive md/lg breakpoints.

Torus-web user perspective. 4 POOLS: eSports (Steam API, kills/wins/playtime, 2.8M TRS); Media (6 platforms X/Instagram/YouTube/Facebook/TikTok, 1.4M TRS); Finance (DEX volume+LP, Uniswap/PancakeSwap/Raydium/SushiSwap/1inch, 5 chains ETH/Polygon/BSC/Arbitrum/Avalanche, 3.2M TRS); Toroidal Income/UBI (BABT+Galxe on BSC, WorldID+Humane Protocol on-chain, 8.9M TRS). AI GATEWAY: OpenRouter BYOK proxy /api/ai/chat/completions, encrypted key storage, weekly TRS rewards Sunday 1:30AM. REFERRALS: unique codes, earn TRS on referred user verify. SECURITY: JWT 24h, CSRF, encrypted OpenRouter keys. TECH: Next.js 15.5/React 19, Wagmi+AppKit, MongoDB, Viem, Node-cron (5 jobs), Mongoose, Shadcn/ui, Recharts, Sonner toasts, React Hook Form+Zod.

Torus-web models (12) at /home/crab/torus-web/models/. User: UUID id, walletId (lowercase unique), walletType (ethereum/polygon/bsc/arbitrum/solana/avalanche), username (sparse 3-30 chars), referralCode (unique), isAdmin, isVerified, verifications{steam,babt,galxe,x}; pre-save updates dateModified; index {walletId,walletType}+sparse unique steam.steamId. Game: UUID, name, parameters+scoring, boost system (overall/parameter-specific). UserGameStats: per-user per-game. GameStats: aggregated game-level. Reward: daily/weekly/monthly. Referral: chain+status. Rankings: 3 separate models (daily/weekly/monthly). ReferralConfig: global. ESportsMetadata: 24h TTL cache. News: admin-managed. AdminLog: audit trail. VerificationConfig: feature flags+reward config.

Torus-web Vitest test patterns. CONFIG: node env, globals:true, __tests__/**/*.test.ts, @=project root, vitest 4.0.18+. MOCKING: vi.hoisted() BEFORE vi.mock() calls; MongoDB: vi.mock('@/lib/mongodb')+static method mocks (findOne/create/aggregate); Auth: vi.mock('@/lib/jwt-auth') mockResolvedValue({userId:'admin-1'}); global fetch: vi.stubGlobal. REQUESTS: NextRequest from 'next/server', new URL(path,'http://localhost:3000'), url.searchParams.set(), {method,headers,body:JSON.stringify()}. SETUP: vi.clearAllMocks() in beforeEach, mockResolvedValueOnce for sequential calls. No shared utils — each test file self-contained with inline createRequest() helper. Route handlers: import named GET/POST/PUT/DELETE from '@/app/api/...'.

Torus-web Vitest tests written (2026). FILES: (1) __tests__/api/auth/steam-callback.test.ts — GET /api/auth/steam/callback; mocks steam-state/steam-auth/User/Referral/Reward; covers invalid state, user-not-found, null steamId, duplicate steamId, success, referral reward, save() failure. (2) __tests__/api/auth/identity-verify.test.ts — POST+GET /api/auth/identity/verify; mocks identity-verification/User/VerificationConfig/Referral/Reward; POST: missing walletId, user-not-found, config creation, RPC errors, BABT/Galxe rewards, re-award prevention, disabled flags, referral flow; GET: status-only. (3) __tests__/api/referrals.test.ts — Referral.find().sort() chain: mockReturnValue({sort:vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(results)}); covers missing userId, stats calc, default config creation. Class mocks: function constructor + Object.assign + instance.save.

Torus-web Design-v2.1 bug audit (2026-03-03). CRITICAL: (1) gameStatsData missing from UserGameStats model but used in api/esports/rankings/user/[userId]/game/[gameId]/route.ts:107-163 → parameters always empty. HIGH: (2) populate('gameId','name') won't work (String not ObjectId ref) → game name always 'Unknown'; (3) api/admin/games/[id]/route.ts catches 'Authentication required' but requireAdmin() throws different strings → auth errors hit 500; (4) referral creation ignores ReferralConfig.isEnabled; (5) /api/ai/api-key + /api/ai/chat/completions use walletId with NO JWT → any caller can impersonate any user; (6) API_KEY_ENCRYPTION_KEY not in .env.example → hard crash. MEDIUM: week number Math.ceil vs ISO 8601 mismatch; non-null assertion after findOne; '$reward.status' should be '$$reward.status' → totalEarnings always 0. LOW: parseInt() no NaN check; JWT fallback secret hardcoded.

TRv1 audit (2026-03-02). PROGRAMS (4 always-on builtins at Pass1veStake1111/Treasury11111/DevRew11111/Governance11111): (1) Treasury — 5 instructions, TreasuryState 66 bytes discriminator=0x54, ~20 tests. (2) Governance — 8 instructions, 6 ProposalTypes (ParameterChange/TreasurySpend/EmergencyUnlock@80%supermajority/ProgramUpgrade/FeatureToggle/TextProposal), 9 statuses, vote weights 30d=0.1x/90d=0.2x/180d=0.3x/360d=0.5x/permanent=1.5x, 58 tests. (3) DevRew — 8 instructions, ProgramRevenueConfig 512 bytes, 10% epoch cap, 7d cooldown, 912-epoch transition launch 10/0/45/45→maturity 25/25/25/25, ~19 tests. (4) PassiveStake — 5 instructions, 84 bytes, tiers 0/30/90/180/360/permanent (500-12000 bps), early unlock burned not treasury, 29 tests. FEE MARKET: EIP-1559 u128, min=5k/max=50M/target=50%/denom=8, 55 tests. CONSENSUS: Tendermint BFT ~1s blocks 6s finality. ~180 unit tests total.

Observation flush/compaction (memory_server.py). TWO-PHASE: captures→.capture_queue.jsonl atomically→flushed to LanceDB via _flush_capture_queue(). TRIGGERS: search_observations, timeline, query_fix_history fallback, boot.py SessionStart. FLUSH: reads+truncates queue, batch upserts (100), then _compact_observations(). COMPACTION (2 mechanisms): (1) TTL 30d — expires via session_time<cutoff, generates DIGEST (tool counts, bash error rate, top errors, top files) saved to curated knowledge (type:digest,auto-generated,area:framework), deletes expired (500 search batch, 100 delete batch); (2) Hard cap 5000 — deletes oldest to 4500. COMPRESS: Bash→'Bash:{cmd}→EXIT{code}|{error}|{out}', Edit→'Edit:{path}(~N lines)', Write→'Write:{path}(N chars)'. IDs: obs_{SHA256[:12]}. Queue: /home/crab/.claude/hooks/.capture_queue.jsonl. All fail-open try/except.

Epicenter Whispering — CLI voice input. WHAT: Open-source local-first desktop transcription app (AGPL-3.0, TypeScript/Svelte 5/Tauri/Rust). Workflow: global shortcut→speak→auto-clipboard→paste into CLI. TRANSCRIPTION: LOCAL (Whisper C++, free, offline, Small model) or CLOUD (Groq $0.04/hr whisper-large-v3-turbo fastest; OpenAI $0.36/hr; ElevenLabs; Deepgram) — audio direct to provider. AI TRANSFORMS: post-processing via Claude/GPT-4/Gemini/Groq. VAD: hands-free mode. CLI: global shortcut in terminal→speak→Ctrl+Shift+V paste; ~$3.60/month at 3h/day Groq. INSTALL: macOS brew install --cask whispering, Windows .msi, Linux .AppImage/.deb/.rpm. BUILD: Bun+Rust+Cargo. Storage: IndexedDB local. PRIVACY: fully offline with Whisper C++.

EIP-1559 fee market: TRv1 vs eclipse-agave (2026-03-02). TRV1 (production-ready, /home/crab/projects/chainovi/TRv1): calculate_next_base_fee() in fee-market/src/calculator.rs:34-85 — u128 arithmetic, delta=current*excess/target/denom, max(delta,1) go-ethereum compatible, clamped [5k,50M]; validate_transaction_fee() returns TransactionFee{base_fee,priority_fee,total_fee}; integrated in runtime/src/bank/trv1_fee_integration.rs:74-90; BlockFeeState.next_block() propagates current→parent; trv1_fee_state:RwLock<BlockFeeState> in Bank; 55 tests total. ECLIPSE-AGAVE: NO fee market — only fixed fee per signature (calculate_fee() in solana-fee/fee/src/lib.rs), no dynamic base fee, no EIP-1559. FEE FEATURES struct: signature-count overrides only. GAP: TRv1 complete EIP-1559; eclipse-agave needs full fee-market port.
